---
title: "Differential Expression Analysis of miRNAs"
author: "Daria"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, 
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7)

setwd("~/GitHub/ncRNA_pipeline")

source("config.R")

source("src/data_processing.R")
```



```{r}
data <- load_and_process_data()

counts <- data$counts
phenotable <- data$phenotable
counts_annotated <- data$counts_annotated

```

```{r}
knitr::kable(
  as.data.frame(table(phenotable$condition)),
  col.names = c("Condition", "N samples"),  
  caption = "Sample distribution across conditions"
)

```

```{r}
highly_expressed <- get_highly_expressed_by_group(counts, phenotable)

# Визуализация
source("src/plots.R")  # загружаем функции визуализации
plot_venn_highly_expressed(highly_expressed)

```
